title: COMMUNITY PLANNING AND DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT - 211info
text: CITY OF SALEM COMMUNITY PLANNING AND DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information services for building permits, multifamily dwelling licenses, inspection services, land use permits, and code compliance. Fields complaints about rental housing safety, abandoned vehicles, tall grass and weeds, and illegal dumping. Also provides advocacy for tenants about communicating with landlords about housing conditions. 440 Church Street SE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 588-6173 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 588-7272 Main phone (503) 588-7272 Alternate Customer Service Center Main phone (503) 588-6173 Alternate (503) 588-6421 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: City of Salem Services: Abandoned Vehicle Reporting/Removal Building and Safety Housing Complaints Illegal Dumping Reporting Landlord/Tenant Dispute Resolution Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - CITY OF SALEM COMMUNITY PLANNING AND PUBLIC WORKS - HOMELESS CAMP REPORTING CONSUMER ASSISTANCE AND PROTECTION - LAW ENFORCEMENT COMPLAINTS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CITY OF SALEM
